code: import api from'./axiosConfig';export const startExam=examId=>api.post('/attempts/start/'+examId);export const saveAnswers=(attemptId,data)=>api.put('/attempts/'+attemptId+'/answers',data);export const submitExam=attemptId=>api.post('/attempts/'+attemptId+'/submit');export const getResult=attemptId=>api.get('/results/'+attemptId);export const getMyResults=()=>api.get('/results/my');/** CHANGE: Download result PDF as blob */export const downloadResultPdf=attemptId=>api.get('/results/pdf/'+attemptId,{responseType:'blob'});
